name: promptwise
description: PromptWise — the cross-agent intelligence layer for AI coding agents. Role-aware prompting, model routing, cost/budget control, security & compliance scanning, workflow planning, a governed agile method (agile personas, quality gates, policy-as-code, hash-chained audit trail), diagrams, task tracking, and 72 portable skill packs. Rides the open standards (MCP · SKILL.md · AGENTS.md) instead of replacing your agent.
